alerts.title: DOJ, CFTC probe George Santos over Kalshi trades tied to State of the Union appearance: report
alerts.summary: DOJ and CFTC are investigating George Santos after Kalshi flagged trades where he allegedly bet against his own State of the Union attendance.

alerts.title: Why Ethereum Could Tank Another 25% Before Finding a Bottom: Analysis
alerts.summary: ETH just crashed below $2,000 and is now trading near $1,841. Prediction markets place a 71% chance on a drop to $1,500—and the charts aren't pushing back.
